final:
module decoder_4to16 (
    input [3:0] in,
    output reg [15:0] out
);
    always @(*) begin
        out = 16'b0000_0000_0000_0000; // Default to all zeros
        out[in] = 1'b1; // Set the output corresponding to the input
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out[7:0] <= ~in[3];
      out[15:8] <= ~in[2];
    end
  end

endmodule
